mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberAddr :: selectById */ a.* , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM mb_member_addr a LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = a.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id WHERE a.member_addr_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberAddr :: selectPageCount */ FROM mb_member_addr a
